# hrobot_boot (Data Source)

Read the boot configuration of a Hetzner Robot server (which rescue/linux/vnc/windows/plesk/cpanel option, if any, is active). Boot activation is a one-shot operation and is intentionally not a managed resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read the current boot configuration of a server (which option, if any, is
# armed for the next reboot). Activation itself is a one-shot operation and is
# not a managed resource.
data "hrobot_boot" "example" {
  server_number = 1234567
}

output "rescue_active" {
  value = try(data.hrobot_boot.example.rescue.active, false)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) Server number.

### Read-Only

- `cpanel` (Attributes) cPanel installation boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cpanel))
- `linux` (Attributes) Linux installation boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--linux))
- `plesk` (Attributes) Plesk installation boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--plesk))
- `rescue` (Attributes) Rescue system boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rescue))
- `vnc` (Attributes) VNC installation boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vnc))
- `windows` (Attributes) Windows installation boot configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--windows))

<a id="nestedatt--cpanel"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cpanel`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the cPanel installer is active.
- `hostname` (String) Configured hostname.


<a id="nestedatt--linux"></a>
### Nested Schema for `linux`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this boot configuration is currently active.
- `arch` (Number) Active architecture (32 or 64).
- `dist` (String) Active distribution.
- `lang` (String) Active language/keyboard layout.


<a id="nestedatt--plesk"></a>
### Nested Schema for `plesk`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the Plesk installer is active.
- `hostname` (String) Configured hostname.


<a id="nestedatt--rescue"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rescue`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the rescue system is active for the next boot.
- `arch` (Number) Active architecture (32 or 64).
- `os` (String) Active rescue OS.


<a id="nestedatt--vnc"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vnc`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this boot configuration is currently active.
- `arch` (Number) Active architecture (32 or 64).
- `dist` (String) Active distribution.
- `lang` (String) Active language/keyboard layout.


<a id="nestedatt--windows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `windows`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the Windows installer is active for the next boot.
- `lang` (String) Active language.
- `os` (String) Active Windows edition.
